message:
chore(matrix): promote pthread mutex/cond/lifecycle to Implemented

After removing host delegation fallbacks, these pthread functions now
use native futex-backed implementations:
- pthread_cond_* (init, destroy, wait, timedwait, clockwait, signal, broadcast)
- pthread_mutex_* (init, destroy, lock, unlock, trylock, timedlock, clocklock)
- pthread_create, pthread_detach, pthread_exit, pthread_cancel
- pthread_setcancelstate, pthread_setcanceltype, pthread_testcancel

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -9535,7 +9535,7 @@
     },
     {
       "symbol": "pthread_cancel",
-      "status": "WrapsHostLibc",
+      "status": "Implemented",
       "module": "pthread_abi",
       "perf_class": "default",
       "strict_semantics": "Native cooperative cancellation via per-thread registry; sets pending flag; async mode consumes immediately",
